title: Accessing Shared Network Drives and File Shares
text:
Q: How do I access shared network drives and file shares?
A: To access shared network drives and file shares, follow these steps: Step 1: Ensure you are connected to the company network, either via Ethernet or VPN if working remotely. Step 2: Open 'File Explorer' on your Windows computer. Step 3: In the left sidebar, click on 'This PC'. Step 4: At the top menu, click on 'Computer' and then select 'Map network drive'. Step 5: Choose a drive letter from the dropdown menu. Step 6: In the 'Folder' field, enter the path to the shared drive in the format: \\servername\sharename (replace 'servername' and 'sharename' with the actual server and share names). Step 7: Check the box for 'Reconnect at sign-in' if you want this drive to be available every time you log in. Step 8: Click 'Finish'. Step 9: If prompted, enter your network credentials (username: domain\yourusername, password: yourpassword). Step 10: The shared drive should now appear under 'This PC' and you can access the files as needed.
